title: Historian-to-Corporate Data Flow Audit — Large ODBC Without SPN

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run, then normalised in Phase A (clause 'IEC 62443-3-2 / Historian-to-corporate data flow audit' → 'SR 2.8'). Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=hist_queries sourcetype="hist:sql" earliest=-7d
| eval bytes_mb=round(bytes/1048576,2)
| where bytes_mb>500 AND match(client_ip,"^10\.12\.") AND isnull(service_principal)
| stats sum(bytes_mb) as total_mb by client_app, client_ip, historian_cluster
| sort - total_mb
value: Tracks large ODBC/JDBC pulls from OT historian to corporate subnets missing service principal authentication.
implementation: (1) Require Kerberos or cert auth for service accounts; (2) throttle BI extracts; (3) DLP review for tag exports; (4) document data classification.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
